description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright machine with a predominantly black exterior and a bold, retro design. The front features a large screen displaying a frog-themed game, with the word 'FROGGY' in stylized yellow letters on a red marquee at the top. Below the screen, there is a control panel with a single joystick and two red buttons, suggesting a simple, single-player control scheme. The side panels are decorated with a large, detailed illustration of a green frog and the 'FROGGY' logo, adding a playful and thematic touch. The lower front section houses a coin door, indicating the machine's use in public or arcade settings. The overall build is robust, with a hard, glossy finish typical of vintage arcade cabinets.
description: A black upright arcade game cabinet with 'FROGGY' branding, frog-themed side art, a screen, joystick, and two red buttons on the control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FROGGY' marquee, game screen, control panel with joystick and two buttons, and a coin door at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large green frog graphic and the 'FROGGY' logo on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned black back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view with a matching green frog graphic and 'FROGGY' logo, mirroring the left side.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single joystick and two red buttons arranged in a simple single-player layout, with no visible markings beyond the button color.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'FROGGY' in bold yellow letters on a red background, matching the playful frog theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, detailed green frog illustration and 'FROGGY' logo in yellow on both side panels, set against a black background.
